puzzle.hint: A promise from the Most Merciful for those who combine faith with good actions.
puzzle.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّۭا
puzzle.verseEn: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
